titles.title: It's the Rising of the Son

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They were hopeless, beaten and so weary, Slaves are waiting for the day of liberty, Just to see the glorious sunrise from the highest mountain top, and this dawn will see their shackles falling off.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's the rising of the Son, a new day has begun, Rays of mercy made us free from sin today, The joy that fills my soul, for the message is my all, Thank you Jesus for this day of liberty.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The grave is empty, He's risen! What a day! Because I live, you shall live as well he say, Resurrected with Christ Jesus, lift your hands towards the sky, Your reward is to be ever at His side.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It's the rising of the Son, I can feel the quickening power, Amazing grace has rent the veil for us that day, Our redeemer and our God, soon will catch away His Bride, Thank you Jesus for this day of victory.
